zh.Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, H: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾
zh.Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Up: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉奧賓-素-希
zh.lifeSummary: 當Helissende de Montreuil於1048年之後出生在法國時，她的父親Enguerrand II de Ponthieu19996歲，母親Adelaide de Normandie8971歲。她和Hugues II de Ponthieu至少有2個兒子。她去世於1128年在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, H: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾
zh-hans.Saint-Aubin-sur-Scie, Seine-Maritime, Up: 法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉奧賓-素-希
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Helissende de Montreuil于1048年之后出生在法国时，她的父亲Enguerrand II de Ponthieu19996岁，母亲Adelaide de Normandie8971岁。她和Hugues II de Ponthieu至少有2个儿子。她去世于1128年在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montreuil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Carolle, Edouard, Jean-Pierre, Marcel, Veronique.
French: habitational name from any of a number of places in northern France, so named from Latin monasteriolum, a diminutive of monasterium ‘monastery’. Compare Montroy .

variants.name: Montroy
meanings: French: habitational name from either of the places so called, in Puy-de-Dôme and Charente-Maritime. This surname is very rare in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Helissende de Montreuil was born after 1048, in France, her father, Enguerrand II de Ponthieu, was 19996 and her mother, Adelaide de Normandie, was 8971. She had at least 2 sons with Hugues II de Ponthieu. She died in 1128, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Helissende de Montreuil est née après 1048, à France, son père, Enguerrand II de Ponthieu, avait 19996 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Normandie, avait 8971 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Hugues II de Ponthieu. Elle est décédée en 1128, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Helissende de Montreuil nach 1048 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Enguerrand II de Ponthieu 19996 und ihre Mutter Adelaide de Normandie 8971. Sie hatte mit Hugues II de Ponthieu mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1128 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Helissende de Montreuil è nata il dopo il 1048 nel Francia, sua padre, Enguerrand II de Ponthieu, aveva 19996 anni e sua madre, Adelaide de Normandie, aveva 8971 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Hugues II de Ponthieu. Morì nel 1128, nel sua cittadina.

ja.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: から1098年1月7日まで1100年1月6日
ja.Normandie, France: フランスノーマンディ

ja.lifeSummary: Helissende de Montreuilが1048年以後にフランスで生まれた時，父Enguerrand II de Ponthieuは19996歳，母Adelaide de Normandieは8971歳であった。彼女はHugues II de Ponthieuとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1128年に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Helissende de Montreuil(이)가 1048년 이후 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Enguerrand II de Ponthieu(은)는 19996세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide de Normandie(은)는 8971세였다. 그녀는 Hugues II de Ponthieu(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1128년 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

lv.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: no 1098. gada 7. janvāra līdz 1100. gada 6. janvārim

mn.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: 1098 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7-аас 1100 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 6 хүртэл

pt.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: de 7 de janeiro de 1098 a 6 de janeiro de 1100
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Helissende de Montreuil nasceu após 1048, em França, seu pai, Enguerrand II de Ponthieu, tinha 19996 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Normandie, tinha 8971 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Hugues II de Ponthieu. Ela faleceu em 1128, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Helissende de Montreuil родилась после 1048 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Enguerrand II de Ponthieu было 19996 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Normandie, 8971. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Hugues II de Ponthieu. Она умерла в 1128 г. в её родном городе.

sm.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: mai le 7 Ianuari 1098 e o'o I le 6 Ianuari 1100

es.Between 7 January 1098 and 6 January 110: desde 7 de enero de 1098 hasta 6 de enero de 1100
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Helissende de Montreuil nació después de 1048, en Francia, su papá, Enguerrand II de Ponthieu, tenía 19996 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Normandie, tenía 8971 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Hugues II de Ponthieu. Murió en 1128, en su pueblo.
